ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_expectancy" (
  "life_expectancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life expectancy record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the record belongs to */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex the record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the life expectancy data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the record belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the country for the given sex */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy value for the given sex */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the life expectancy confidence interval */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the life expectancy confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_expectancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_specific_life_expectancy" (
  "sex_specific_life_expectancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex-specific life expectancy record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the record belongs to */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex the record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the life expectancy data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the record belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the country for the given sex */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy value for the given sex */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the life expectancy confidence interval */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the life expectancy confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_specific_life_expectancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sex_specific_life_expectancy_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sex_specific_life_expectancy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sex_specific_life_expectancy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hale" (
  "hale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HALE record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the record belongs to */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex the record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the HALE data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the record belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the country for HALE */,
  "hale" REAL /* HALE value for the country */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the HALE confidence interval */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the HALE confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hale_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hale_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hale_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the dataset belongs to */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was published */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the readme file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (both sexes, female, male) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)
